---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it valuable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Business Context

How does this align with IMC's business goals or brand?

- [ ] Corporate & Business Training
- [ ] Athletic Performance (OCTRI)
- [ ] Digital Solutions & Technology
- [ ] General website improvement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
